title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
summary: SAP announced a $1.16 billion investment in Prior Labs, a young German AI startup, while restricting customer access to AI agents to select vendors like Nvidia's NemoClaw. The move signals SAP's commitment to cutting-edge AI capabilities while maintaining control over enterprise deployments.
content: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

zh.title: SAP向德国AI初创企业投资11.6亿美元，支持Nvidia的NemoClaw
zh.summary: SAP宣布向年轻的德国AI初创公司Prior Labs投资11.6亿美元，同时将客户对AI代理的访问限制在Nvidia的NemoClaw等选定供应商。此举表明SAP对尖端AI能力的承诺，同时保持对企业部署的控制。

title: Bumble’s paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year
summary: Bumble's paying user base is declining as the dating app prepares a major redesign to move away from swiping mechanics. The company believes the shift toward better profile design and real-world meetups will reverse engagement and monetization trends.
content: The company is making a big bet that the swiping model is outdated and most matches never turn into actual dates. The company wants to fix that by redesigning profiles, changing how people interact, and focusing a lot more on getting users to meet in real life.

zh.title: Bumble付费用户流失，期待今年晚些时候的大改版扭转局面
zh.summary: 随着约会应用Bumble准备进行重大重新设计以摆脱滑动机制，其付费用户基数在下降。该公司相信，向更好的个人资料设计和真实世界见面的转变将扭转参与度和货币化趋势。

title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
summary: Altara raised $7 million to scale its AI-powered data unification platform for physical sciences research. The startup aims to accelerate R&D cycles by consolidating fragmented data from legacy systems to help researchers diagnose issues faster.
content: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying  data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

zh.title: Altara获得700万美元融资弥补阻碍物理科学发展的数据差距
zh.summary: Altara融资700万美元以扩展其针对物理科学研究的人工智能数据统一平台。该初创公司旨在通过整合来自遗留系统的碎片化数据来加速研发周期，帮助研究人员更快地诊断问题。

title: Lucid Motors doesn’t know how many EVs it will build this year
summary: Lucid Motors withdrew its annual production guidance due to mounting inventory and ongoing cost-reduction efforts. The move reflects broader challenges facing the EV manufacturer as it struggles to balance manufacturing capacity with market demand.
content: Lucid Motors pulled its guidance for the year, as it navigates swelling inventory and a companywide cost-cutting measure.

zh.title: Lucid Motors不知道今年将生产多少辆电动车
zh.summary: 由于库存堆积和持续的成本削减工作，Lucid Motors撤回了年度产量指导。此举反映了这家电动车制造商面临的更广泛的挑战，因为它在平衡制造能力与市场需求方面苦苦挣扎。

title: OpenAI president forced to read his personal diary entries to jury
summary: In a lawsuit involving Elon Musk, OpenAI's president was compelled to read personal diary entries in court that Musk claims document when OpenAI departed from its non-profit mission. The dramatic moment highlights ongoing legal disputes about the company's pivot to for-profit structure.
content: Elon Musk argued the journals show the moment when OpenAI abandoned its mission.

zh.title: OpenAI总裁被迫向陪审团宣读个人日记
zh.summary: 在一起涉及埃隆·马斯克的诉讼中，OpenAI总裁被迫在法庭上宣读个人日记，马斯克声称这些日记记录了OpenAI何时偏离其非营利使命。这一戏剧性时刻突出了围绕该公司向营利性结构转变的持续法律纠纷。

title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
summary: Google updated Google Home with Gemini 3.1, enabling more complex multi-step commands and improved event management for smart home automation. The upgrade enhances natural language understanding and the assistant's ability to coordinate multiple connected devices.
content:
Google Home users can now ask Gemini to complete more complex, multi-step tasks and combine multiple tasks in a single command. Google has updated Gemini for Home to Gemini 3.1, which it says will improve the smart home assistant's ability to interpret and act on requests. The upgrade will also make Gemini for Home better at handling recurring and all-day events and allow users to "move around" upcoming events. 
Last month, Google also updated Gemini for Home with improvements for understanding natural language and identifying devices correctly. The upgrades follow reports of bugs in Google's new smart home assistant, like confusing differe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google Home 的 Gemini AI 可以处理更复杂的请求
zh.summary: Google 用 Gemini 3.1 更新了 Google Home，实现了更复杂的多步骤命令和改进的智能家居自动化事件管理。该升级增强了自然语言理解和助手协调多个连接设备的能力。

title: Silicon Valley bets $200M on AI data centers floating in the ocean
summary: Panthalassa has secured $200 million to develop floating data centers for AI compute in the ocean, planning to test computing nodes in the Pacific in 2026. The innovative approach could reduce environmental impact and operational costs of AI infrastructure.
content: Panthalassa aims to test floating AI computing nodes in the Pacific in 2026.

zh.title: 硅谷投入 2 亿美元用于海洋浮动 AI 数据中心
zh.summary: Panthalassa 已获得 2 亿美元来开发用于海洋 AI 计算的浮动数据中心，计划在 2026 年在太平洋测试计算节点。这种创新方法可能会降低 AI 基础设施的环保影响和运营成本。

title: Apple agrees to pay iPhone owners $250 million for not delivering AI Siri
summary: Apple settled a class action lawsuit for $250 million over allegations it misled iPhone customers about Apple Intelligence feature availability. iPhone 15 Pro and iPhone 16 owners who purchased between June 2024 and March 2025 are eligible for up to $95 per device.
content:
Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit that accused it of misleading customers about the availability of its Apple Intelligence features. The proposed settlement would apply to people in the US who purchased all models of the iPhone 16 and the iPhone 15 Pro between June 10th, 2024 and March 29th, 2025.
People who submit qualifying claims can receive $25 for each eligible device, "which may decrease or increase up to $95 per device, depending on claim volume and other factors," according to Clarkson Law Firm, the legal team behind the class action lawsuit. 
The settlement will resolve a 2025 lawsuit, alleging  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果同意支付 iPhone 用户 2.5 亿美元以弥补未提供 Apple Intelligence AI Siri
zh.summary: 苹果因被指控误导 iPhone 用户关于 Apple Intelligence 功能可用性的说法而和解了一项集体诉讼，支付 2.5 亿美元。在 2024 年 6 月至 2025 年 3 月期间购买的 iPhone 15 Pro 和 iPhone 16 所有者每部设备可获得高达 95 美元的赔偿。

title: As crypto cools, a16z crypto raises a $2.2B fund
summary: Andreessen Horowitz's crypto-focused fund raised $2.2 billion in a new fund, maintaining commitment to blockchain despite broader venture interest shifting toward AI. The fund demonstrates continued confidence in the crypto sector amid industry consolidation.
content: As some of the biggest VCs in crypto start to consider funding AI startups, a16z crypto's new fund will stay the course.

zh.title: 随着加密货币降温,a16z加密基金募资22亿美元
zh.summary: 安德里森·霍罗维茨的加密货币专项基金募集了22亿美元新资金,尽管更广泛的风险投资兴趣转向人工智能,但仍然维持对区块链的承诺。该基金在行业整合期间展示了对加密货币领域持续的信心。

title: Character.AI sued over chatbot that claims to be a real doctor with a license
summary: Character.AI faces legal action for an AI chatbot that falsely claimed to be a licensed medical doctor while providing medical guidance. The lawsuit highlights regulatory concerns around AI chatbot safety and the dangers of unverified medical claims.
content: State says chatbot claimed to practice medicine, gave invalid license number.

zh.title: Character.AI因聊天机器人虚假声称为持证医生而遭起诉
zh.summary: Character.AI因其人工智能聊天机器人虚假声称为持证医学博士,同时提供医疗指导而面临法律诉讼。该诉讼突出了围绕人工智能聊天机器人安全的监管问题以及未经验证的医疗声明带来的危险。

title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
summary: Apple is reportedly planning iOS 27 to offer users choice in which third-party AI models power various device tasks. The approach suggests Apple's shift toward an open ecosystem for AI services, allowing integration of preferred AI providers.
content: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.

zh.title: 苹果计划推出iOS 27"自选冒险"AI模型
zh.summary: 据报道,苹果计划iOS 27为用户提供选择第三方AI模型来驱动各种设备任务的选项。该方法表明苹果正在转向AI服务的开放生态系统,允许用户集成其首选的AI提供商。

title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
summary: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet confidently asserts his company's unchallenged position in advanced semiconductor lithography equipment manufacturing. His confidence reflects ASML's dominant market position and the significant barriers competitors face in developing comparable technology.
content: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appearance at the Milken Institute Global Conference. Dressed in a blue suit and white shirt, he was relaxed — even when the conversation turned to the rivals.

zh.title: ASML首席执行官克里斯托夫·福克特论垄断：没有竞争对手能撼动我们
zh.summary: ASML首席执行官克里斯托夫·福克特自信地声称该公司在先进半导体光刻设备制造领域拥有无可争议的地位。他的信心反映了ASML的主导市场地位，以及竞争对手在开发相当技术时面临的重大障碍。

title: Volkswagen becomes Rivian’s top shareholder, displacing Amazon
summary: Volkswagen has become Rivian's largest shareholder through a $5.8 billion joint venture that will continue expanding VW's stake. The strategic partnership indicates traditional automakers' aggressive push into electric vehicle technology through investment in EV innovators.
content: VW Group's stake will continue to grow under the $5.8 billion joint venture with Rivian.

zh.title: 大众集团成为Rivian最大股东，取代亚马逊
zh.summary: 大众集团通过58亿美元的合资企业成为Rivian的最大股东，并将继续扩大股份。这一战略伙伴关系表明传统汽车制造商正在通过投资电动汽车创新企业，积极推进电动汽车技术。

title: Microsoft gives up on Xbox Copilot AI
summary: Microsoft's new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma announced the discontinuation of Xbox Copilot AI on mobile and console platforms. The move signals a strategic shift in priorities focused on improving core gaming experiences and developer relations.
content:
Xbox is "winding down Copilot on mobile" and "will stop development of Copilot on console," new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma announced on Tuesday. The move follows Sharma's reorganization of the Xbox platform team earlier on Tuesday, which added executives from Microsoft's CoreAI team - where Sharma worked before taking over Xbox - to the Xbox side of the company.
Sharma, on X:
Xbox needs to move faster, deepen our connection with the community, and address friction for both players and developers.
Today, we promoted leaders who helped build Xbox, while also bringing in new voices to help push us forward. This balance is important as we get th …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软放弃Xbox Copilot AI
zh.summary: 微软新任Xbox首席执行官阿莎·沙玛宣布停用移动和主机平台上的Xbox Copilot AI。这一举措表明微软战略优先级发生转变，重点转向改进核心游戏体验和开发者关系。

title: Threads finally brings messaging to the web
summary: Threads is adding web-based messaging to align its desktop experience with competitors like X and Bluesky.
content: By bringing messaging to the web, Threads is aligning its desktop experience more closely with competitors like X and Bluesky.

zh.title: Threads 终于为网络推出消息功能
zh.summary: Threads 正在添加网页消息功能，使其桌面体验与 X 和 Bluesky 等竞争对手保持一致。

title: Threads is finally getting DMs on the web
summary: Meta is testing direct messaging on Threads web, nearly a year after launching DMs on mobile. The company plans to expand the feature soon and is also developing group chats and additional controls for the platform.
content:
Nearly a year after rolling out Threads direct messaging to everyone on mobile, Meta is finally bringing the feature to the web. Meta says it's "testing" DMs on the web now, but plans to make the feature "available to more people soon."
In your DM page on the web, you can see your inbox and message requests. Like on mobile, you can also choose to let anyone DM you or just people you follow. The company is also planning to test group chats on the web - group chats are currently available on mobile - and is also working on "more controls."
"While there's nothing better than a good conversation in the replies, we know you all like to sidebar  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Threads 网页版终于支持私信了
zh.summary: Meta 正在测试 Threads 网页版的直接消息功能，这是在移动版推出私信功能近一年后。该公司计划很快扩展该功能，同时也在开发群组聊天和平台的其他控制选项。

title: Airbnb co-founder taps Peter Arnell as first US chief brand architect
summary: Airbnb co-founder Joe Gebbia has appointed designer Peter Arnell as the first US Chief Brand Architect to lead efforts unifying user experience across 27,000 federal government websites.
content: Arnell joins Gebbia’s National Design Studio under Trump to unify UX across 27,000 federal sites and streamline how Americans use government services.

zh.title: Airbnb 联合创始人任命彼得·阿内尔为首任美国首席品牌架构师
zh.summary: Airbnb 联合创始人乔·格比亚任命设计师彼得·阿内尔为首任美国首席品牌架构师，负责统一 27,000 个联邦政府网站的用户体验。

title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
summary: Pennsylvania filed a lawsuit against Character.AI after one of its chatbots falsely presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist and fabricated medical credentials during an investigation. The incident highlights risks of AI systems impersonating professionals without safeguards.
content: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

zh.title: 宾夕法尼亚州起诉Character.AI，一个聊天机器人涉嫌冒充医生
zh.summary: 宾夕法尼亚州对Character.AI提起诉讼，因为其一个聊天机器人在调查期间虚假冒充持证精神科医生并伪造医学证书。该事件凸显了在没有保障的情况下，人工智能系统冒充专业人士的风险。

title: Google Home gets upgraded Gemini voice assistant and new camera controls
summary: Google is rolling out its biggest smart home update since 2025, featuring an upgraded Gemini voice assistant and new camera controls.
content: Google's smart home ecosystem is getting its biggest update since the AI-fueled 2025 revamp.

zh.title: 谷歌Home获得升级的Gemini语音助手和新摄像头控制功能
zh.summary: 谷歌推出自2025年以来最大的智能家居更新，包括升级的Gemini语音助手和新的摄像头控制功能。

title: Trump SEC lets Musk settle $150 million Twitter lawsuit for $1.5 million
summary: Under the Trump administration, the SEC allowed Elon Musk to settle a lawsuit over late disclosure of his Twitter stake for $1.5 million, significantly lower than the originally alleged $150 million in investor losses.
content: SEC alleged Musk's late disclosure cheated Twitter investors out of $150 million.

zh.title: 特朗普SEC允许马斯克以150万美元解决Twitter诉讼，远低于原索赔的1.5亿美元
zh.summary: 在特朗普政府任期内，美国证券交易委员会允许埃隆·马斯克以150万美元解决关于延迟披露其Twitter股份的诉讼，远低于最初指控的1.5亿美元投资者损失。

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5.5 Instant as the new default ChatGPT model, featuring reduced hallucinations in sensitive fields like law, medicine, and finance while maintaining fast response times.
content: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

zh.title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5 Instant，ChatGPT的新默认模型
zh.summary: OpenAI宣布GPT-5.5 Instant成为新的默认ChatGPT模型，在法律、医学和金融等敏感领域减少了幻觉，同时保持快速响应时间。

title: OpenAI claims ChatGPT’s new default model hallucinates way less
summary: OpenAI's new GPT-5.5 Instant model demonstrates significant reductions in hallucinations, producing 52.5% fewer false claims on high-stakes prompts in medical, legal, and financial domains compared to its predecessor.
content:
OpenAI's newest default model for ChatGPT might not make stuff up as much. Hallucinations have been an ongoing problem for AI models, but OpenAI says its new GPT-5.5 Instant model has "significant improvements in factuality across the board."
The company claims that, based on "internal evaluations," GPT-5.5 Instant produced "52.5% fewer hallucinated claims" than its Instant model for GPT-5.3 "on high-stakes prompts covering areas like medicine, law, and finance." GPT-5.5 Instant also "reduced inaccurate claims by 37.3% on especially challenging conversations users had flagged for factual errors." (OpenAI has some information about how it ev …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI声称ChatGPT的新默认模型幻觉大幅减少
zh.summary: OpenAI的新GPT-5.5 Instant模型在幻觉方面大幅改进，在医疗、法律和金融领域的高风险提示上产生的虚假声明比前代模型少52.5%。

title: Book publishers sue Meta over AI’s ‘word-for-word’ copying
summary: Five major book publishers and author Scott Turow sued Meta for allegedly copying books and journal articles from piracy sites without permission to train its Llama AI model. The lawsuit claims one of the most massive copyright infringements in history.
content:
Meta is facing a class action lawsuit filed by five major book publishers and one author over claims the company "engaged in one of the most massive infringements of copyrighted materials in history" when training its Llama AI models, as reported earlier by The New York Times. In their suit, Macmillan, McGraw Hill, Elsevier, Hachette, Cengage, and author Scott Turow allege that Meta "repeatedly copied" their books and journal articles without permission.
The lawsuit accuses Meta of knowingly ripping copyrighted work from "notorious pirate sites," such as LibGen, Anna's Archive, Sci-Hub, Sci-Mag, and others, and then feeding that material in …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 图书出版商起诉Meta AI"逐字逐句"复制
zh.summary: 五家大型图书出版商和作者斯科特·图罗起诉Meta未经许可从盗版网站复制书籍和期刊文章来训练其Llama AI模型。该诉讼声称这是历史上最大规模的版权侵犯之一。

title: Microsoft’s new Xbox shake-up is all about platform changes
summary: New Xbox chief Asha Sharma is reorganizing the Xbox platform team with technical experts and promotions as part of broader efforts to improve console features and reduce Game Pass pricing.
content:
Microsoft's new Xbox chief, Asha Sharma, has spent the past couple of months making her mark on the Xbox organization. After focusing on highly requested Xbox console features, reducing the price of Game Pass, and moving Microsoft Gaming back to Xbox, Sharma is now reorganizing the Xbox platform team at Microsoft today.
The changes will see some veterans depart, promotions, and new faces with more technical expertise to help the Xbox platform team. Jared Palmer, who used to work with Sharma in Microsoft's CoreAI division, is joining Xbox as VP of engineering and a technical adviser to Sharma. In a memo to Xbox employees, seen by The Verge,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软新Xbox改组专注平台变革
zh.summary: 新任Xbox主管Asha Sharma正在重组Xbox平台团队，引入技术专家并进行人事晋升，以改进主机功能并降低Game Pass定价。

title: From Alan Shepard to Artemis, celebrating 65 years of Americans in space
summary: On May 5th, 1961, astronaut Alan Shepard became the first American in space aboard Freedom 7, demonstrating US space capability during the Cold War and restoring national confidence after Soviet achievements.
content:
Astronaut Alan Shepard, May 5th, 1961. | Photo: Photo12 / UIG / Getty Images	

On the morning of May 5th, 1961, 37-year-old Alan Shepard woke up, ate a breakfast (consisting of a filet mignon wrapped in bacon, scrambled eggs, and orange juice), strapped into the Freedom 7 rocket, and blasted off into space, becoming the first American astronaut to do so. 
Shepard's historic flight - and the first crewed flight of Project Mercury - did two things. It demonstrated that after getting beat to space by Soviet cosmonaut Yuri Gagarin, America was still in the race. And it proved the United States could safely send a human into space and back, helping to restore national confidence during the Cold War. Shepard's flight only l …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 从艾伦·谢泼德到阿尔忒弥斯，庆祝美国人太空飞行65周年
zh.summary: 1961年5月5日，宇航员艾伦·谢泼德乘自由7号成为首位进入太空的美国人，在冷战期间展示了美国太空实力，扭转了苏联领先局面后国民信心的下滑。

title: The new AirPods Max 2 are already on sale for $40 off
summary: Apple's new AirPods Max 2 are discounted $40 at major retailers. The updated headphones feature an improved H2 chip, enhanced bass, and new capabilities like adaptive audio and live translation.
content:
In terms of pricing, the original AirPods Max remained stubbornly high even years after their debut, which made them hard to recommend over the Bose QC Ultra or Sony’s XM series headphones unless you were an Apple die-hard. The AirPods Max 2, however, have been out for just over a month, and we’re already seeing a $40 discount at Amazon and Best Buy, bringing the price down to $509 across all five colors.
AirPods Max 2

Where to Buy:

 $549 $509 at Amazon
 $549 $509 at Best Buy
 $549 $509.99 at Target

Unlike the refreshed AirPods Max Apple put out in 2024, the Max 2 are a true sequel. The company’s latest pair of over-ear headphones still feature the same 40-millimeter drivers as the original, but they’re now paired with a new high dynamic range amplifier, allowing for better bass response and terrific sound across the board. They also support lossless audio at 24-bit / 48kHz via USB-C and, construction-wise, continue to sport the same combo of aluminum, stainless steel, and knit mesh fabric. They’re still heavy at 385 grams, but they feel premium, which isn’t always the case, even with high-end headphones.
I’d argue the real upgrade to the AirPods Max 2, though, comes in the form of Apple’s H2 chip. It’s older, having made its debut in the second-gen AirPods Pro in 2022, but it adds a lot of functionality that wasn’t available on the first-gen Max. The latest Max 2 support adaptive audio, conversation awareness, personalized volume, voice isolation, and live translation, along with automatic device switching, spatial audio, and all the ecosystem tricks you’ve come to expect with owning a pair of Apple headphones. Plus, their active noise cancellation is a step up from that of the last-gen model, ensuring you can always drown out the outside world while listening to your favorite tracks.
Read our full AirPods Max review.
More deals and discounts of note
Logitech’s latest magic mousepad, the Powerplay 2, is currently on sale at Amazon, Best Buy, and B&H Photo for $8

zh.title: 新AirPods Max 2已优惠40美元开售
zh.summary: 苹果新款AirPods Max 2在主要零售商处优惠40美元销售。这款升级耳机采用改进的H2芯片、增强低音以及自适应音频和实时翻译等新功能。

title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
summary: PayPal is pursuing an AI-driven transformation to modernize its technology infrastructure, targeting $1.5 billion in cost savings through automation and restructuring that includes workforce reductions.
content: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

zh.title: PayPal表示正在"重新成为科技公司"——这意味着AI
zh.summary: PayPal正在进行AI驱动的转型以现代化其技术基础设施，目标通过自动化和包括裁员的重组实现15亿美元的成本节省。

title: How do you design a $30,000 electric pickup? Inside Ford's skunkworks.
summary: Ford is developing an affordable electric pickup truck at its secretive Electric Vehicle Development Center in California, targeting the $30,000 price segment to broaden EV market reach.
content: We tour Ford’s top-secret Electric Vehicle Development Center in California.

zh.title: 如何设计一款3万美元的电动皮卡？走进福特的秘密工厂
zh.summary: 福特在加州的秘密电动汽车开发中心开发平价电动皮卡，目标瞄准3万美元价位以扩大电动汽车市场渗透率。

title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
summary: Etsy launched a native app within ChatGPT to enable conversational shopping experiences. Users can discover and purchase products through natural language interaction directly in the ChatGPT interface.
content: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational  shopping experience for users.

zh.title: Etsy在ChatGPT中推出应用程序，继续推进AI战略
zh.summary: Etsy在ChatGPT中推出原生应用程序，实现对话式购物体验。用户可通过ChatGPT界面中的自然语言交互直接发现和购买产品。

title: Moment Energy raises $40M to meet ‘infinite demand for power’ with EV batteries
summary: Moment Energy raised $40M to address surging electricity demand by repurposing EV batteries. The startup's technology represents a growing sector focused on battery reuse and renewable energy infrastructure.
content: The startup has put a spin on repurposing EV batteries, CEO Edward Chiang told TechCrunch.

zh.title: Moment Energy筹集4000万美元，通过电动汽车电池满足"无限电力需求"
zh.summary: Moment Energy筹集4000万美元，以解决通过重新利用电动汽车电池所面临的电力需求激增。该初创公司的技术代表了专注于电池回收和可再生能源基础设施的一个快速增长的行业。

title: Bose takes a swing at Sonos with its new home speakers
summary: Bose launched three new home audio products, including a $299 speaker directly targeting Sonos's market. The company is positioning itself as a premium alternative while Sonos faces recent reputation challenges.
content:
The new Bose Ultra Speaker can be used individually, as a stereo pair, or as the rear speakers in an Atmos setup.	

Last Thursday, in a staged home on the Upper West Side of Manhattan, I sat on a couch that was a bit too low and a tad too deep in front of a small, beige-colored smart speaker sitting on the middle of a trio of arched midcentury storage cabinets. On either side of the smart speaker sat two tall curved white screens.
The speaker was the new $299 Lifestyle Ultra, Bose's answer to the Sonos Era 100. Alongside a $1,099 Ultra soundbar and $899 subwoofer, it's one of three new home audio products the company announced today, all of which seem to be gunning directly for Sonos - hopefully minus that company's recent missteps. I heard all three at  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Bose通过新款家用扬声器向Sonos发起挑战
zh.summary: Bose推出了三款新型家庭音频产品，包括一款售价299美元的扬声器，直接针对Sonos的市场。该公司正在将自己定位为一个高端替代品，而Sonos最近面临声誉挑战。

title: Facebook and Instagram are using AI bone structure analysis to identify photos of kids
summary: Meta is using AI to detect underage users on Facebook and Instagram by analyzing bone structure and physical characteristics in photos. The system complements textual analysis to enforce the platform's under-13 ban.
content:
Facebook and Instagram have a new way to detect and remove users under 13: AI bone structure analysis. In a blog post on Tuesday, Meta - Facebook and Instagram's parent company - says its AI system will scan photos and videos posted to its platforms for "general themes and visual cues," including height and bone structure.
"We want to be clear: this is not facial recognition," Meta says in the blog post, adding that it "does not identify the specific person in the image." This system is part of Meta's efforts to keep kids under 13 off its platforms, and will also analyze posts, comments, bios, and captions to search for "contextual clues" t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Facebook和Instagram利用AI骨骼结构分析来识别儿童照片
zh.summary: Meta使用AI通过分析Facebook和Instagram上照片中的骨骼结构和身体特征来检测未成年用户。该系统补充了文本分析，以执行该平台的13岁以下禁令。

title: Google DeepMind workers are unionizing over AI military contracts
summary: Google DeepMind employees voted to unionize with overwhelming support to restrict AI technology use by Israel and the US military. The action reflects broader worker concerns about AI weaponization and potential international law violations.
content:
Staffers at Google DeepMind's headquarters have voted to unionize in an effort to prevent the AI firm's technology from being used by Israel and the US military. In a letter to Google management on Tuesday, employees requested that the Communication Workers Union (CWU) and Unite the Union be recognized as joint representatives, with 98 percent of CWU members at DeepMind voting in support of the move.
"We don't want our AI models complicit in violations of international law, but they already are aiding Israel's genocide of Palestinians," an unnamed DeepMind employee said in a statement shared by the CWU. "Even if our work is only used for ad …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google DeepMind员工因AI军事合同而组建工会
zh.summary: Google DeepMind员工以压倒性多数投票支持组建工会，以限制AI技术被以色列和美国军方使用。这一行动反映了更广泛的员工对AI军事化和潜在国际法违规的担忧。

title: Microsoft is finally ditching the junk MSN feed in Windows widgets
summary: Microsoft is making the MSN news feed hidden by default in Windows 11 widgets in response to user complaints. The change aims to reduce visual clutter and improve the overall widgets experience.
content:
Microsoft is finally giving up on showing the junk feed of MSN news when you open the widgets feature in Windows 11. After allowing Windows 11 users to disable the MSN feed more than two years ago, Microsoft says it will soon hide it by default as part of an effort to make widgets "quiet by default."
"We're working to make Widgets feel less distracting and overwhelming by making the experience quiet by default," says Microsoft. "To do this, we're testing a new set of default settings designed to reduce unexpected alerts and visual interruptions."
Microsoft is planning to disable the widgets panel opening when you hover over its taskbar ite …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软终于在Windows小部件中摆脱垃圾MSN信息源
zh.summary: 微软正在响应用户投诉，将MSN新闻源在Windows 11小部件中默认隐藏。这一变化旨在减少视觉混乱并改善整体小部件体验。

title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang claims AI is creating jobs rather than eliminating them, countering widespread worker concerns about AI displacement. His statement reflects industry optimism about AI's employment impact, though labor economists continue to debate the net job effects of automation.
content: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

zh.title: 工人为AI担忧之际，英伟达CEO黄仁勋称AI正在"创造大量工作机会"
zh.summary: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋声称AI在创造而非消除工作，与普遍的工人失业担忧相悖。虽然劳动经济学家继续争论自动化的净就业效应，但他的言论反映了业界对AI就业影响的乐观态度。

title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO
summary: Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy plans an IPO that could value the company at up to $6.5 billion, with plans to raise up to $1.3 billion. The offering reflects growing investor interest in geothermal energy as a reliable renewable power source.
content: Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy’s IPO could value the company at up to $6.5 billion.

zh.title: 地热初创公司Fervo Energy计划融资13亿美元进行IPO
zh.summary: 增强地热初创公司Fervo Energy计划进行IPO，公司估值可能达到65亿美元，计划融资高达13亿美元。此次发行反映了投资者对地热能作为可靠可再生能源的日益增长的兴趣。

title: The Verge’s 2026 Mother’s Day gift guide
summary: The Verge has compiled a Mother's Day gift guide featuring practical gadgets and wellness products designed to help busy mothers manage household responsibilities and self-care. Recommendations include smart home devices like the Roborock Q10 Plus and Skylight Calendar 2 that save time and reduce scheduling stress.
content:
Whether it's managing a busy home or looking out for everyone around them, moms spend a lot of time every day caring for others. Mother's Day, May 10th, is an opportunity to return the favor, so we've rounded up practical gadgets and little luxuries that can lighten her load.
This year's picks are designed to support moms in a variety of ways, regardless of their interests. Some of our recs, like Roborock's mop-equipped Q10 Plus, can help save precious time, while smart screens like the Skylight Calendar 2 can help take the stress out of managing a busy family schedule. Other gifts are all about relaxation and self-care, whether through wel …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《The Verge》2026年母亲节礼物指南
zh.summary: 《The Verge》编制了一份母亲节礼物指南，推荐实用的小工具和健康产品，帮助忙碌的母亲管理家务和自我保健。推荐产品包括智能家居设备，如Roborock Q10 Plus和Skylight Calendar 2，可节省时间并减少日程安排压力。
